excluded.reason: Block inherits PostHero light-on-gradient pattern; no dark variant specified in spec
Single hero image only, not a gallery
Hero image is decorative background, no lightbox needed

extra.description: When start and end dates are on the same day, the date should display once with both start and end times (not repeat the date)
External URL button should only render when the event has _EventURL meta populated
Venue name should only render when the event has a valid _EventVenueID with a venue post that has a title
Event date/time formatting should use WordPress i18n date functions (date_i18n) for locale-aware output
When event has no featured image, the hero should still render correctly without the masked background image
